title: centaurium erythraea subsp. erythraea
intro: Centaurium erythraea subsp. erythraea, also known as common centaury, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Gentianaceae family, typically found in wetlands and meadows. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centaurium erythraea subsp. erythraea include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Centaurium erythraea subsp. erythraea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and health.
